title: 'BTS: The Return' Documentary Premieres on Netflix
detail: Netflix releases 'BTS: The Return,' a documentary following the making of the ARIRANG album — from the group's reunion after military service through recording, rehearsals for the Gwanghwamun concert, and behind-the-scenes footage from the comeback week. Debuts one week after the album release and concert livestream.

media.caption: BTS: The Return documentary premieres on Netflix

title: ARIRANG Tracking for Biggest US Album Debut of 2026 (600K–625K Units)
detail: ARIRANG tracks at 600,000–625,000 equivalent album units for its first week in the US (Billboard 200 chart week ending March 26) — on course to be the biggest US album debut of 2026. 'Swim' holds No. 1 on Spotify Global for six consecutive days (March 20–25). ARIRANG also sweeps Japanese Oricon weekly charts and reaches No. 1 on Australia's ARIA albums chart.

media.caption: ARIRANG tracking for biggest US album debut of 2026 with 600K-625K units
